sentences.arabic: كَانَ طَالِبٌ يَدْرُسُ وَلَمْ يَفْهَمِ الدَّرْسَ.
sentences.translation: Učenik je učio ali nije razumio lekciju.
sentences.translationEn: A student was studying but did not understand the lesson.

sentences.arabic: دَعَا اللَّهَ أَنْ يُعِينَهُ عَلَى الْفَهْمِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je Allaha da mu pomogne u razumijevanju.
sentences.translationEn: He supplicated to God to help him understand.

sentences.translation: Zatim je polako ponovo čitao i razumio.
sentences.translationEn: Then he read again calmly and understood.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الدُّعَاءُ مَعَ الْعَمَلِ يَفْتَحُ الطَّرِيقَ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Dova uz rad otvara put.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Supplication with effort opens the way.
